providers.name: AI21 Labs
providers.description: $10 trial credits at signup, no credit card. Credits expire in 3 months. Covers Jamba Large and Jamba Mini.

providers.name: Alibaba Cloud Model Studio
providers.description: 1M free tokens per Qwen model on signup, expires in 90 days (International / Singapore region). No credit card required.

providers.name: Cohere
providers.description: Free "Trial" API key, no credit card. 1,000 API calls/month. Non-commercial use only.

providers.name: DeepSeek
providers.description: 5M free tokens on signup, no credit card. Credits expire 30 days after signup; pay-as-you-go after. Prompts may be used for training unless opted out.

providers.name: Google Gemini
providers.description: Free tier unavailable in EU/UK/Switzerland. Free-tier prompts may be used by Google to improve products.

providers.name: Mistral AI
providers.description: Free "Experiment" plan, no credit card. ~1B tokens/month. Prompts may be used to improve models.

providers.name: Z AI (Zhipu AI)
providers.description: Permanent free models, no credit card required.

providers.name: Cerebras
providers.description: Free tier, no credit card. Ultra-fast inference (~2,600 tok/s). 1M tokens/day cap. 8K context cap on free tier. llama3.1-8b scheduled for deprecation May 27, 2026.

providers.name: Cloudflare Workers AI
providers.description: 10,000 Neurons/day free. 50+ models available on free tier.

providers.name: GitHub Models
providers.description: Free prototyping for all GitHub users. 45+ models. Per-request limits (8K in / 4K out).

providers.name: Groq
providers.description: Free tier, no credit card. Ultra-fast LPU inference.

providers.name: Hugging Face
providers.description: 100K monthly Inference Provider credits for free users. Routes to Fireworks, Together, Hyperbolic, Nebius, Novita, DeepInfra and others. Thousands of models.

providers.name: Kilo Code
providers.description: Free models with no credit card required. `kilo-auto/free` auto-router routes to minimax/minimax-m2.5:free (80%) and stepfun/step-3.5-flash:free (20%).

providers.name: LLM7.io
providers.description: Zero-friction API gateway. No registration needed for basic access. 30+ models. GDPR-compliant.

providers.name: ModelScope
providers.description: Free API-Inference for registered users. Requires Alibaba Cloud account binding + real-name verification.

providers.name: Nebius
providers.description: $1 free signup credits, no credit card required. 60+ open-source models via OpenAI-compatible API. EU-based.

providers.name: Nscale
providers.description: $5 free signup credits, no credit card required. EU-sovereign provider; data centers in Norway. "No rate limits, no cold starts."

providers.name: NVIDIA NIM
providers.description: Free with NVIDIA Developer Program membership. 100+ models. Rate-limited (no daily token cap).

providers.name: Ollama Cloud
providers.description: Free tier with qualitative usage limits. 400+ models from Ollama library. Not OpenAI SDK-compatible; uses [Ollama API](https://docs.ollama.com/cloud).

providers.name: OpenRouter
providers.description: ~28 free models (marked with `:free` suffix). OpenAI SDK-compatible.

providers.name: OVHcloud AI Endpoints
providers.description: Free anonymous tier (no API key, no signup): 2 RPM per IP per model. 40+ open-weight models hosted in EU. OpenAI SDK-compatible.

providers.name: SiliconFlow
providers.description: 3 permanently free models. Free tier capped at 50 req/day; ≥10 CNY lifetime purchase raises cap to 1,000/day. 200+ paid models also available.

providers.name: Aion Labs
providers.description: Free daily token allowance, no credit card required. Specialized for roleplay and storytelling.

providers.name: xAI
providers.description: $25 sign-up credit, no credit card required. One-time only; additional $150/month available via opt-in data-sharing program (requires prior spend).
